summary: Comprehensive full-stack testing of 'Народный Контроль' (People's Control) civic engagement platform. All 45 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages tested successfully with authenticated session. Both desktop and mobile navigation work correctly. Features tested: Google Auth, Reviews system, Organizations Map, News Feed, Info Widgets (Weather/Currency/Magnetic), Problems Map, Identity Verification, Admin Panel, Rewards/Points, Referral program, Notifications, Rating/Leaderboard.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reviews returns reviews with correct fields
Backend: GET /api/news returns 5+ seeded news articles
Backend: GET /api/news/news_seed_001 returns single article and increments views
Backend: GET /api/widgets/weather returns weather data with temperature, humidity, wind, uv_index
Backend: GET /api/widgets/currency returns rates for USD, EUR, CNY, GBP, TRY
Backend: GET /api/widgets/magnetic returns Kp data array
Backend: GET /api/map/problems returns problems with coordinates
Backend: GET /api/rating/leaderboard returns users sorted by points
Backend: Authenticated GET /api/profile returns user data
Backend: Authenticated GET /api/rating/status returns rating info
Backend: Authenticated GET /api/verification/status returns verification details
Backend: Authenticated GET /api/referral/stats returns referral info
Backend: Authenticated POST /api/reviews creates review with status pending
Backend: Admin GET /api/admin/reviews returns all reviews
Backend: Admin GET /api/admin/users returns all users
Frontend: Login page renders with Google auth button (data-testid='google-login-btn')
Frontend: Dashboard page renders with stats cards and review feed
Frontend: News page renders with articles, like/comment buttons, create form
Frontend: Widgets page renders with weather, currency, magnetic, UV widgets
Frontend: Problems Map page renders with Leaflet map, markers, status filters, legend
Frontend: Verification page renders with phone/passport/bank/yandex sections
Frontend: Profile page renders with rating status, referral program, settings
Frontend: Rewards page renders with points balance and reward cards
Frontend: Admin page renders with reviews/users/stats tabs (for admin role)
Frontend: Map page renders with organizations, search, category filters
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows 10 nav items + Admin link
Frontend: Mobile bottom nav shows 5 items
Frontend: Mobile sidebar opens and shows all nav items
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented across all pages
External APIs (weather, currency, magnetic) are real integrations, not mocked
Authentication flow uses session tokens stored in MongoDB with proper expiry
Review verification system with 2-confirmation requirement working correctly
Points/rewards system with age-group filtering working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages render correctly, all features working)

seed_data_creation: Created admin test user with session token (test_session_comprehensive_1773178288724) for authenticated testing. User has 500 points, admin role, and referral code TESTCODE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features are fully functional. Test session token: test_session_comprehensive_1773178288724. Test user ID: test_user_comprehensive_1773178288724. Admin user can access /admin page. All pages have proper data-testid attributes. External widget APIs (weather, currency, magnetic) are live integrations from open-meteo.com, cbr-xml-daily.ru, and swpc.noaa.gov. Seeded data includes 8 organizations, 5 reviews, 5 news articles, 11 rewards.
